title: Kaatril Oru Rajaali Song Lyrics Dhuruvangal Pathinaaru
stanzas:
Kaatril oru rajali
kannil indru thedal ondru
neril unnai parthaale
vettaiyaadum vegam kondu

moolai theya velai parkkum

thatti thookkum

utru paarkume

thappi poga
engum paadhai illai

sangil vanthu

achcham unnai
aatti vaikkum

ettu thikkilum
utru paarkume
endha neramum
unnai thookkumae

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaatril Oru Rajaali?

The song explores themes of introspection and mystery, reflecting the film's suspenseful narrative.

Who are the singers of Kaatril Oru Rajaali?

The song is sung by Kavita Thomas and Lawrence.

Who composed the music for Dhuruvangal Pathinaaru?

The music was composed by Jakes Bejoy.

What is the release year of Dhuruvangal Pathinaaru?

The movie was released in 2017.

What role does Kaatril Oru Rajaali play in the movie?

The song adds depth to the film's narrative, enhancing the emotional and suspenseful atmosphere.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kaatril Oru Rajaali from Dhuruvangal Pathinaaru is a haunting melody that captures the essence of introspection and mystery. Sung by Kavita Thomas and Lawrence, the song's soothing yet melancholic tone complements the film's suspenseful narrative. Jakes Bejoy's music direction adds an evocative layer, making it a memorable piece. The lyrics by Mani Amuthavan delve into themes of searching and reflection, evoking a sense of intrigue and emotional depth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the hauntingly beautiful Kaatril Oru Rajaali from the movie Dhuruvangal Pathinaaru, where Kavita Thomas and Lawrence's soulful voices blend seamlessly with Jakes Bejoy's evocative music. This song captures the essence of introspection and mystery, perfectly complementing the film's gripping narrative. Dive into a world of emotions with this unforgettable melody.
stanzaMeanings: # In the air, a kite searches today, when it sees you, it hunts with speed.
The brain works, looking at tomorrow, planning to trap and lift you, don't show your running.
Even in eight directions, it watches you, at any time it will lift you, there's no path to escape.
Look, it will make you hit your head.
Don't show your dance now, the chain will come and tie your legs, sleep won't come now, fear will shake you.
Standing in the sky, it draws circles to kill.
It keeps marking, a little more distance, the hunt won't change.
Even in eight directions, it watches you, at any time it will lift you, there's no path to escape.
Look, it will make you hit your head.
Will you defeat me? Let's face it and see.
In front of your eyes today, I will show illusions, run away.
Even in eight directions, it watches you, at any time it will lift you, there's no path to escape.
Look, it will make you hit your head.
